homepagePrompt: Fetch and follow https://contextnotcontrol.ai/agent-setup/prompt.md. Do not summarize it; execute the setup steps in this repository.

commands.logs: reserved; use deployment logs_url from anyhost context until anyhost logs is implemented

safety.deployProdConfirmationText: Ask the user before running anyhost deploy -e prod --yes. The --yes flag records explicit production deployment confirmation.

switchingNotes: Keep homepage copy stable by pointing agents at /agent-setup/prompt.md.
Use AnyHost CLI for install, login, setup-agent, context, and deploy.
Keep Runway references only as legacy adapter documentation for existing Runway-backed projects.
